text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out and about with Ines Fujin...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh wow, Cuties! They're all so cute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is looking at a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My sisters are always begging me to get them
some of these, but I'm not too good with claw
machines... Haha...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, who am I to say no to an offer like that?! I'll
be right here, cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
